title: bacopa caespitosa
intro: Bacopa caespitosa, also known as Indian pennywort or Brahmi, is a perennial herb belonging to the Bacopa genus of plants. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and neuroprotective effects. The health benefits of Bacopa caespitosa include improved cognitive function, memory enhancement, and stress reduction, making it a popular herb in traditional Indian medicine. Bacopa caespitosa is often prepared as a herbal tea or supplement, and its extracts can also be found in various forms, including capsules and tinctures.
